intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 (matrix.mtx.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz). Using scanpy, do standard QC, normalization, highly-variable genes, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering and a UMAP, then identify marker genes per cluster and show me a UMAP and a marker dotplot.

blocks.text: Good, the GSM5746268 triplet is there. Now let me read the relevant skill for this analysis and then present a plan.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "description": "Standard scanpy processing for ONE scRNA-seq sample.", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + first-pass clustering (scanpy). Halt and present_plan before running on an unfamiliar dataset \u2014 the QC thresholds and the clustering resolution are dataset-dependent. Steps: sc.read_10x_mtx; calculate_qc_metrics; filter cells (n_genes>=200) & genes; filter pct_counts_mt; normalize_total(target_sum=1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; scale; pca; neighbors; leiden; umap; rank_genes_groups (wilcoxon) for markers. Plots: QC violin, HVG, UMAP colored by leiden, marker dotplot."}

blocks.text: Perfect. Now let me present the plan before executing:

input.title: Standard scRNA-seq QC + clustering for GSM5746268 PBMC sample
input.summary: Load 10x triplet, apply QC filters, normalize, identify HVGs, embed with PCA/neighbors, cluster with Leiden, visualize with UMAP, and identify cluster markers.
input.assumptions:
- Single PBMC sample (GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1)
- Standard thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, pct_counts_mt ≤ 20%
- Leiden resolution appropriate for PBMCs (default ~1.0)
- Markers identified using Wilcoxon rank-sum test

steps.title: Load 10x MTX triplet
steps.description: Read matrix.mtx.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz into AnnData object

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics & visualize
steps.description: Compute n_genes, n_counts, pct_counts_mt; produce QC violin plot

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Apply thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, pct_counts_mt ≤ 20%; remove unexpressed genes (n_counts > 0)

steps.title: Identify cluster markers
expected_outputs: Marker genes per cluster (top 10–20 per cluster)

steps.title: Visualize results
steps.description: UMAP colored by Leiden cluster; dotplot of top markers × clusters
